report.summary: Cycle-close v10: Zero delta from v9 — no new commits, deploys, or promotions. 758 uncommitted items (+10 from v9, all new reports). Deploy drift now 7+ days. 2 items remain in PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: PAGE AUDIT: 492 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES, 389 have page.tsx files (103 missing — unchanged from v9). Missing pages span /learn, /wallets, /investing/best, /taxes, /blog, /defi-lending/reviews, /trading, /compare/exchanges.

TYPESCRIPT: 46 errors across 3 files (structured-data.examples.ts, crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026/page.tsx, crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx) — identical to v9, non-blocking due to ignoreBuildErrors.
NO NEW REGRESSIONS: Zero commits since v9. No code changes to introduce regressions.
KNOWN ISSUES PERSIST: /compare/exchanges missing page.tsx, /trading missing page.tsx, 103 published slugs without backing routes.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: API ROUTES LOCAL: All 6 core data route files confirmed present — prices, trending, fear-greed, market-dominance, defi-yields, market-metrics (150 lines).

PRODUCTION STATUS (per v9 Chrome check): 5/6 routes healthy (prices, trending, fear-greed, market-dominance, defi-yields all 200). /api/market-metrics still 404 in production — route exists locally but is uncommitted.
CACHE TTLs: Unchanged — fear-greed 10min, trending 5min, market-metrics 60s, market-dominance 5min, prices 60s, defi-yields configurable. SWR at 2x on all.
RATE LIMITING: Still only on /api/health and /api/cache-stats. 6 core data routes remain unprotected — P1 carry-over.
ADDITIONAL ROUTES: news-rss, newsletter, notifications, standup-email, subscribe also present locally.

sections.title: DevOps
items: LAST DEPLOY: Commit e999560 (Mar 17) — 7 days ago. Zero commits since last deploy.
UNCOMMITTED WORK: 758 items (up from 748 in v9, delta is new report files). Includes 48 changed files with +4,336/-3,464 lines.
CRITICAL UNCOMMITTED: middleware.ts, published-pages.ts (+154 lines), 20+ new page routes, /api/market-metrics, next.config.ts, sw.js.
DEPLOY RISK [P0]: 7-day drift is critical. All pages promoted since Mar 17 are invisible to users and Google. Every hour = lost indexing.
SITE STATUS: Production site remains live and serving from Mar 17 snapshot.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE (v10): No new changes — verification-only cycle confirming v9 findings.
PUBLISH QUEUE: 2 items remaining — /learn/tokenized-treasuries-rwa-yield-guide-2026, /tools/funding-rate-tracker.
TOTAL LOCAL: 492 published slugs in local published-pages.ts. Production running ~338 from Mar 17 deploy.
ACTION REQUIRED [P0]: Commit all 758 uncommitted items and deploy to Vercel. 7 days of drift is critical — this is the #1 blocker.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Fix /api/market-metrics 404 by including in next commit.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Fix 46 TS errors in 3 files.
ACTION REQUIRED [P2]: Drain final 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items.
CARRY-OVER: Rate-limit 6 core API routes, build /trading page, build /compare/exchanges page, add missing page.tsx for 103 published slugs, add JSON-LD to pages missing structured data.
